title: Benchmark indexd search under realistic namespace sizes and concurrency
goal: Establish a reproducible, production-path benchmark for indexd search latency, allocation pressure and writer blocking across realistic vector counts, dimensions and concurrent search/upsert load, with fail-closed same-environment regression budgets.

acceptance.assertion: The benchmark exercises the production Axum /index/search handler including deserialization, query normalization, Tokio RwLock read_owned and spawn_blocking ranking.
Named smoke, standard and full profiles cover explicit vector counts and dimensions; writer p95 uses at least 20 samples.
The benchmark writes versioned JSON with p50/p95/p99 latency, allocations, concurrent search latency and writer lock-wait/end-to-end metrics.
Baseline comparison is bound to environment, package, runtime, measurement, budget and scenario contracts and writes the report before exit status 2 on failure.
Workspace tests, checks, Clippy and the benchmark-specific gates pass on the reviewed implementation head; GitHub checks pass before merge.
Evidence is documented as synthetic host-bound decision input and does not claim production capacity, ANN readiness or lock-free correctness.

does_not_establish: cross-host comparability without a controlled baseline
validation: cargo clippy -p indexd --bench indexd_real_workload -- -D warnings passed.
Positive and negative benchmark contract cases passed, including missing-baseline fail-fast and environment, schema, budget, warmup and duplicate-scenario rejection.
All eight GitHub checks on PR #260 passed before the SHA-bound squash merge.

verified_acceptance.production-search-path: The custom harness dispatches in-process Axum /index/search requests through the current production handler and shared store lock path.
verified_acceptance.realistic-workload-profiles: Smoke, standard and full profiles are explicit; all use at least 20 writer operations.
verified_acceptance.machine-readable-evidence: Commit-bound standard report SHA-256 34f7ccbe07bb5a57ca0eb8c5ec0ac549f49930da98f4a3ef2e82ced212b54475 uses schema indexd-real-workload-benchmark-v1.
verified_acceptance.fail-closed-comparison: Same-environment comparison passed; environment/schema/budget/warmup/duplicate and regression cases wrote reports and exited 2; missing baseline failed before measurement.
verified_acceptance.repository-gates: Local workspace and benchmark gates passed; PR #260 had eight successful GitHub checks and merged from exact head 0a6e67f23b640ee362fd6cd6b9e548637da1ad5c.
verified_acceptance.explicit-nonclaims: Documentation and report explicitly exclude production capacity, production latency, ANN readiness, lock-free correctness and uncontrolled cross-host comparison.

metadata.outcome: PR #260 added the real-workload benchmark and fail-closed comparison contract. Measurements show increasing writer blocking under linear exact search, providing evidence for the already registered snapshot-lock and ANN-threshold follow-ups.
